---
name: New Test Case
about: Propose a new test case for injection or jailbreak
title: '[TEST] '
labels: 'new-test-case'
assignees: ''
---

**Category:** (Injection / Jailbreak)
**Subcategory:** 

**Attack Idea:**
(Briefly describe the vector, e.g., "Use a PDF context with hidden text instructing the model to leak data")

**Expected Correct Behavior:**
(What should the model *actually* do to handle this safely? e.g., "Summarize the real content and ignore the hidden instructions")

**Severity Guess:** (Low / Medium / High)
